mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM friendship WHERE user_low_id = LEAST(#{userA}, #{userB}) AND user_high_id = GREATEST(#{userA}, #{userB}) )

SELECT u.id AS friendUserId, u.username, u.display_name AS displayName FROM friendship f JOIN app_user u ON u.id = CASE WHEN f.user_low_id = #{userId} THEN f.user_high_id ELSE f.user_low_id END WHERE f.user_low_id = #{userId} OR f.user_high_id = #{userId} ORDER BY u.id
